ORDER DENYING PLAINTFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANA MARICELA SALAZAR'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BECAUSE THIS CASE INVOLVES ALLEGATIONS OF UNPAID CHILD SUPPORT, IT SHOULD BE BROUGHT IN FAMILY COURT, NOT CIVIL COURT. MOREOVER, EVEN IF THIS IS A PROPER CIVIL ACTION, THE MOTION SHOULD BE DENIED DUE TO A TRIABLE ISSUE REGARDING HOW MUCH, IF ANY, CHILD SUPPORT IS OWED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, CSR: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2012 10:30 AM
REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR ON OCT-01-2012 IN DEPT. 502 -STATEMENT OF DECISION FILED AND ENTERED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, ANA MARICELA A.K.A. MARICELA A. BUITRAGO HEARING SET FOR AUG-31-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-31-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, ANA MARICELA A.K.A. MARICELA A. BUITRAGO TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT JAJEH, XIOMARA FATIMA AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTA TE OF JOSE RIGOBERTO BUITRAGO, DECEASED ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $1,793.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,793.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
